footer.tagline: Connecting premium global skills, driving cross-border business growth
footer.copyright: AI-Link · Global Cross-Border HR Service Platform

hero.title: Connect Global Executors
hero.subtitle: Ensure Stable Cross-Border Fulfillment
hero.desc: AI-Link provides cross-border escrow, tracking, and collaboration for your teams. Transparent and controllable from publishing demands to settlement.
hero.metaP2: Contact details unlock only after order acceptance

trust.text: Trusted by e-commerce, SaaS teams, independent brands, and agencies

cards.title: Escrow & Acceptance
cards.desc: Funds are held in escrow after payment, progressing by status to reduce uncertainty.

cards.title: Smart Matching
cards.desc: Quickly filter executors by country, skills, and price range to improve efficiency.

cards.title: Cross-Border Collab
cards.desc: Designed for multi-timezone teams, unifying order status and messages.

cards.title: Commercial Scalability
cards.desc: Supports single tasks to long-term collaboration, building a stable network.

cards.name: Localization Translation
cards.desc: Copywriting, pages, and script adaptation for local languages.

cards.name: Overseas Advertising
cards.desc: Multi-channel ad optimization and local creative testing.

cards.name: Video Editing
cards.desc: Short video and ad iteration tailored to market preferences.

cards.name: Social Media Ops
cards.desc: Account content publishing and daily engagement.

cards.name: Remote Assistant
cards.desc: Process execution, data sorting, and collaboration.

process.title: Clear Path from Publish to Fulfillment

steps.title: Publish Demand
steps.desc: Define country, category, budget, and delivery standards.

steps.title: Select Executor
steps.desc: Filter based on capabilities, create orders, and lock collaboration.

steps.title: Pay & Accept
steps.desc: Service fee paid into escrow, executor confirms and unlocks contact.

steps.title: Accept & Settle
steps.desc: Review and rate upon completion to build long-term trust.

cta.title: Start Your Cross-Border Collaboration Now
cta.desc: Post demands, discover executors, and build global execution capabilities.
cta.employerBtn: I'm an Employer, Post a Task
cta.workerBtn: I'm an Executor, Apply to Join

demandHall.title: Global Demand Hall
demandHall.subtitle: Browse public demands quickly and filter by country, category, and keywords. Log in to continue matching, ordering, and fulfillment in workspace.
demandHall.searchPlaceholder: Search demand keywords (e.g. localization, ad campaigns)
demandHall.requireWorkerApproved: You can apply after executor approval
demandHall.needWorkerApproved: Please complete executor approval in profile first
demandHall.applyPromptMessage: Please enter your quote (up to 2 decimals)
demandHall.applySuccess: Application submitted. Please wait for demand owner review.

categoryPage.title: Cross-Border Service Directory
categoryPage.subtitle: Quickly locate demand scenarios by category. In Demand Hall, continue filtering by country and keyword.
categoryPage.cardDesc: View public demands under this category
categoryPage.empty: No matching categories. Try other keywords.

workerShowcase.title: Verified Executor Showcase
workerShowcase.subtitle: Filter candidate executors by skills and country. Log in to start matching and collaboration in workspace.
workerShowcase.searchPlaceholder: Search skill keywords (e.g. SEO, video editing, translation)

auth.asideDesc: Log in to post tasks, find executors, create orders, and drive cross-border fulfillment.
auth.heading: Log In / Sign Up

dashboard.heroSub: Secure cross-border collaboration with escrow, covering demand publishing, executor matching, order fulfillment, and settlement.

publishDemand.title: Post Cross-Border Demand
publishDemand.subtitle: Submit once to enter the full flow of matching, escrow, fulfillment, and settlement. Clearer demands lead to faster deals.
publishDemand.placeholderTitle: Example: Localized product copy for Singapore market
publishDemand.placeholderCategory: Search or enter category, e.g. Web Development / Translation / Video Editing
publishDemand.countryEmptyTip: No country options available. Please contact admin to configure dictionary entries.
publishDemand.placeholderDescription: Describe deliverables, timeline, acceptance criteria, and collaboration method.
publishDemand.tip1: Include country + category + delivery goal in the title to improve matching speed.
publishDemand.tip2: Clear budgets lead to more stable quotes and less negotiation time.
publishDemand.tip3: Write acceptance criteria in the description to reduce dispute rate.
publishDemand.tip4: Use platform escrow to avoid offline payment risks.
publishDemand.countryLoadFailed: Failed to load country dictionary. Please try again later.
publishDemand.preferredWorkerHint: After submission, this demand will target executor profile ID #{id}.

workerPool.title: Executor Pool
workerPool.subtitle: Filter available executors by country and category, then create orders directly into the service-fee unlock flow.
workerPool.alertDemandIdMissing: No demandId detected. You can browse resources only and cannot create orders. Please post a demand first.
workerPool.alertNotDemandOwner: Current account is not the publisher of this demand and cannot create orders. Please switch to the publisher account.
workerPool.alertPreferredWorkerBound: This demand has a selected executor {name} (ID #{id}). Orders can only be created for this executor.
workerPool.alertFallback: No direct matching executors found for current demand. Showing all available executors. You can continue filtering manually.
workerPool.searchEmpty: No executor matched your keyword. Please refine your search.
workerPool.countryLoadFailed: Failed to load country dictionary. Please try again later.
workerPool.demandLoadFailed: Failed to load demand information. Switched to manual filtering mode.
workerPool.createNeedDemandId: Missing demandId. Please post a demand first.
workerPool.createOnlyOwner: Only demand publisher can create orders. Please switch account and try again.
workerPool.createOnlyPreferredWorker: This demand has a selected executor. Please create the order for that executor.
workerPool.createFailed: Failed to create order. Please try again later.

demandApplications.title: Demand Application Management
demandApplications.subtitle: Executors can actively apply for demands. Demand owners can review and create orders from the application pool.
demandApplications.acceptPromptMessage: You can set deal amount (optional, empty means default to executor quote)

orderList.title: My Orders
orderList.subtitle: Check each order's amount split, service-fee status, and fulfillment progress. Click to view details.
orderList.searchPlaceholder: Search by Order ID / Demand ID / Worker ID
orderList.deleteSelectRequired: Please select at least one order first
orderList.deleteConfirmMessage: Delete {count} selected orders? Unfinished orders cannot be deleted.
orderList.deletePartial: Deleted {deleted} order(s). {blocked} unfinished order(s) were skipped.
orderList.deleteBlocked: {count} selected order(s) are unfinished and cannot be deleted.

orderDetail.aiAnalyzing: AI is analyzing the evidence chain and generating a verdict. Please refresh later...
orderDetail.completedTip: Both parties can submit reviews below.
orderDetail.disputeTip: Platform is handling this dispute. Please follow status updates.
orderDetail.noAction: No available actions in current status.
orderDetail.contactLocked: Contact and payout info unlock after executor accepts the order
orderDetail.chatWarning: For your protection, complete transactions on platform
orderDetail.noReviewPermission: You have reviewed already or have no review permission
orderDetail.tipServiceFeeEmployer: After payment, the order enters waiting-for-acceptance status. Contact, payout, and chat are unlocked after acceptance.
orderDetail.tipNoPayPermission: Current role has no payment permission. Please use demand-side account (USER/EMPLOYER/CLIENT).
orderDetail.tipWaitEmployerPay: Waiting for demand-side payment to unlock.
orderDetail.tipWaitAcceptWorker: Please decide whether to accept. You can start fulfillment after acceptance.
orderDetail.tipWaitAcceptEmployer: You can keep waiting for acceptance, or cancel proactively.
orderDetail.tipNeedEmployerDeclare: Waiting for the employer to declare payment before work can start.
orderDetail.tipEmployerDeclareAfterTransfer: You already have the executor payout details. After external transfer, click "I Have Paid the Executor".
orderDetail.tipMatchUnlockedWorker: After executor starts, order enters fulfillment stage.
orderDetail.tipMatchUnlockedEmployer: Executor has not started yet. You may cancel the order.
orderDetail.tipMatchUnlockedOther: Waiting for executor to start work.
orderDetail.tipInProgressEmployer: After confirmation, you can submit review.
orderDetail.tipNoClientPermission: Current role has no demand-side permission. Please use demand-side account (USER/EMPLOYER/CLIENT).
orderDetail.tipInProgressOther: Fulfillment is in progress, waiting for demand-side completion confirmation.
orderDetail.loadFailed: Failed to load order detail. Please try again later.
orderDetail.payConfirmMessage: Confirm paying service fee and unlocking executor info?
orderDetail.externalPaymentRiskMessage: The platform does not monitor external transfers and cannot guarantee or refund such payments. Verify the executor identity carefully before transferring.
orderDetail.payMockSuccess: Test mode auto-payment succeeded. Waiting for executor acceptance.
orderDetail.payQrCreated: Payment QR code generated. Complete payment to proceed to waiting-for-acceptance.
orderDetail.payOrderCreated: Payment order created. Complete payment to proceed to waiting-for-acceptance.
orderDetail.acceptConfirmMessage: Confirm accepting this order and unlocking contact info?
orderDetail.declarePaidConfirmMessage: Please confirm you have externally paid the executor (deposit or full payment). This will notify the executor to start work.
orderDetail.declarePaidDone: Payment declaration submitted. Executor has been notified.
orderDetail.sendFailed: Failed to send. Please try again later.

orderCheckout.title: Service Fee Checkout
orderCheckout.subtitle: Pay the platform service fee first, then continue to match unlock and external fulfillment.
orderCheckout.tipNeedPay: Please pay the platform service fee first. You can continue to match unlock after payment.
orderCheckout.tipPaidDone: Service fee has been completed. You can proceed to the match unlock page.
orderCheckout.tipNoPermission: Only the demand-side account can pay the service fee.
orderCheckout.tipUnavailable: No checkout action is required in current status. Please open order detail.
orderCheckout.loadFailed: Failed to load order data. Please try again later.
orderCheckout.paySuccessMock: Test payment succeeded. Redirecting to match unlock page.
orderCheckout.payQrCreated: Payment QR generated. Complete payment, then click "I Paid, Check Status".
orderCheckout.payCreated: Payment order created. Complete payment, then click "I Paid, Check Status".
orderCheckout.checkPending: Payment success is not detected yet. Please try again later.

orderMatch.title: Match Unlock & Kickoff
orderMatch.subtitle: After service fee payment, view executor payout details and finish bilateral declarations before work starts.
orderMatch.timelineWorkerConfirmed: Executor confirmed payment and started work
orderMatch.riskWarning: The platform does not monitor external transfers. Verify identity carefully before sending money.
orderMatch.contactLocked: Executor contact is still locked in current stage. Please complete service-fee flow first.
orderMatch.tipNeedCheckout: Service fee payment is still required before match unlock.
orderMatch.tipWaitingAccept: Executor has not accepted yet. Please wait.
orderMatch.tipNeedEmployerDeclare: Waiting for employer payment declaration first.
orderMatch.tipEmployerDeclare: You already have payout details. Click "I Have Paid the Executor" after external transfer.
orderMatch.tipWorkerCanStart: Employer has declared payment. You can start work now.
orderMatch.tipWaitingStart: Payment declaration is done. Waiting for executor to start.
orderMatch.tipInProgress: Order is in progress. Continue tracking in order detail.
orderMatch.tipCompleted: Order is completed. Review details are available in order detail.
orderMatch.tipViewDetail: Please continue operation in order detail for current status.
orderMatch.blockingNeedPayFee: Waiting for employer to pay service fee.
orderMatch.blockingNeedWorkerAccept: Waiting for executor to accept the order.
orderMatch.blockingNeedEmployerDeclare: Waiting for employer to declare external transfer.
orderMatch.blockingNeedWorkerStart: Waiting for executor to confirm payment and start work.
orderMatch.blockingInProgress: Order is in progress, waiting for acceptance or dispute decision.
orderMatch.blockingCompleted: Order is completed. Flow is finished.
orderMatch.blockingClosed: Order is closed. Flow is terminated.
orderMatch.blockingUnknown: Please open order detail to continue handling this status.
orderMatch.loadFailed: Failed to load order data. Please try again later.
orderMatch.externalRiskMessage: External transfers are not protected or refundable by the platform. Continue only if verified.
orderMatch.declareConfirmMessage: Please confirm you have paid the executor externally. This will notify the executor to start.
orderMatch.declareDone: Executor has been notified. Waiting for start confirmation.
orderMatch.startConfirmMessage: Confirm you have verified payment and will start work?

userCenter.workerApplySubtitle: Submit skills and supporting materials. Your account will be upgraded to executor after admin approval.
userCenter.applyAttachmentTip: Supports Word, JPG, PNG files. Maximum size: 5MB.
userCenter.workerApplyCountryAutoHint: Country is auto-filled from your profile. To change it, use Edit Profile first.
userCenter.myDemandsSubtitle: Profile page manages profile and demands only. Please check orders on the "My Orders" page.
userCenter.paymentSubtitle: Only external payout links are stored. No payment SDK integration and no fund ledger is recorded.
userCenter.paymentPrivacyNotice: The platform will never hold or deduct your funds. These payout details are shown only to paid employers.
userCenter.paymentRiskMessage: The platform does not monitor external transfers and does not guarantee refunds. Verify the link carefully and beware of fraud.
userCenter.editDialogSubtitle: Update your basic information. Country is selected from dictionary for consistent matching and analytics.
userCenter.countryLoadFailed: Failed to load country dictionary. Please try again later.
userCenter.applyTipPending: Under review, please wait for admin processing.
userCenter.applyTipApproved: Application approved. Refresh to use executor features.
userCenter.applyTipRejected: You can update information and resubmit.
userCenter.applyTipDefault: Usually takes effect after admin approval.
userCenter.cancelReasonMatched: This demand has entered matching/fulfillment. Please cancel related orders first.
userCenter.cancelReasonDone: This demand is completed and cannot be canceled.
userCenter.cancelReasonUnsupported: Current status {status} does not support cancellation.
userCenter.cancelConfirmMessage: Confirm cancel this demand? It will no longer participate in matching.
userCenter.cancelFailed: Failed to cancel demand. Please try again later.
userCenter.profileUpdateFailed: Update failed. Please try again later.
userCenter.fillRequired: Please fill in all required fields first
userCenter.priceRangeInvalid: Max price cannot be lower than min price
userCenter.attachmentUploadFailed: Failed to upload attachment. Please try again later.
userCenter.attachmentTypeInvalid: Only Word, JPG, and PNG files are supported
userCenter.applySubmitSuccess: Executor application submitted, please wait for review
